Program
  ProgramHead
    PROGRAM: program
    ID: errtest
  DeclarePart
    TypeDecPart
      TypeDec
        TYPE: type
        TypeDecList
          ID: myint
          =: =
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          ;: ;
          TypeDecList
            ID: myint
            =: =
            TypeDef
              BaseType
                CHAR: char
            ;: ;
    VarDecPart
      VarDec
        VAR: var
        VarDecList
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          VarIDList
            ID: x
            VarIDMore
              ,: ,
              VarIDList
                ID: y
          ;: ;
          VarDecList
            TypeDef
              BaseType
                CHAR: char
            VarIDList
              ID: c
            ;: ;
            VarDecList
              TypeDef
                ID: myint
              VarIDList
                ID: m
              ;: ;
  ProgramBody
    BEGIN: begin
    StmList
      Stm
        InputStm
          READ: read
          (: (
          ID: x
          ): )
      StmMore
        ;: ;
        StmList
          Stm
            InputStm
              READ: read
              (: (
              ID: unknown
              ): )
          StmMore
            ;: ;
            StmList
              Stm
                ID: x
                AssignmentRest
                  :=: :=
                  Exp
                    Term
                      Factor
                        Variable
                          ID: c
                    OtherTerm
                      AddOp
                        +: +
                      Exp
                        Term
                          Factor
                            INTC: 1
              StmMore
                ;: ;
                StmList
                  Stm
                    ID: c
                    AssignmentRest
                      :=: :=
                      Exp
                        Term
                          Factor
                            Variable
                              ID: x
                  StmMore
                    ;: ;
                    StmList
                      Stm
                        ID: y
                        AssignmentRest
                          :=: :=
                          Exp
                            Term
                              Factor
                                Variable
                                  ID: x
                            OtherTerm
                              AddOp
                                +: +
                              Exp
                                Term
                                  Factor
                                    Variable
                                      ID: c
                      StmMore
                        ;: ;
                        StmList
                          Stm
                            ID: myint
                            AssignmentRest
                              :=: :=
                              Exp
                                Term
                                  Factor
                                    INTC: 5
                          StmMore
                            ;: ;
                            StmList
                              Stm
                                OutputStm
                                  WRITE: write
                                  (: (
                                  Exp
                                    Term
                                      Factor
                                        Variable
                                          ID: x
                                  ): )
    END: end
  .: .
